reviews.review_msg: I went to office hours. She told me I wasn't intelligent enough for university and should go to trade school. I was on the Dean's List during my undergrad, and am doing a PhD. Her class was damaging. By the end of the semester, she dehumanized me and undermined my sense of capacity so badly that I almost left university without finishing my degree.

Awful teacher. The lectures and readings were inaccessible. Some students really struggled. When she handed papers back, one person got an F, and others could see. She joked that some students are incapable of 'doing philosophy', but need to fail miserably to find out.

This was hands-down the absolute worst course I have ever taken, and Jill was hands-down the rudest, least available, least helpful, and worst profs I have ever had the displeasure of meeting. Do not take any classes with her. She is stuck up and selfish. Our class averages for exams were all below 30%. Gives no time on exams. Wish I could give a 0
Very knowledgeable, she has interesting lectures. iClicker questions during class for credit. It doesn't matter if your conclusion is wrong, as long as you defend it.
This is too difficult for a 100 course. Her lecture is not high-quality compare with what she expected to her students. Do not take her class.

I do just fine at stats but couldn't crack this weird pseudo-programming philosophy. I passed the class & still have no idea how; lectures vary between horrifically byzantine & yawn inducing. No time for midterms, which are themselves a nightmare. Book isn't helpful, neither is she. Absolutely murdered my GPA. Abandon hope all ye who enter here.
Don't do this to yourself. Take something else.

The material interested me, including both of the textbooks. But when 55 min feels like an eternity, something is wrong! The lecture slides felt incomplete and dry. Her expectations regarding exams or essays were non-existent. I love philosophy, but not enough to sit through these lectures.
Do not take this class. Her explanations are all over the place, not only that but TAs are no help. Regret taking this class.
